overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket exploring a dimly lit, atmospheric apartment building interior. The character moves through an entry room, ascends a wooden staircase, and explores upper floor corridors with vintage decor and moody lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: entry lobby with glass doors leading to stairwell

events.description: character approaches and passes through glass doorway into stairwell area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dimly lit lobby area toward a glass doorway

entered.detail: glass panel doors with metal frames leading to interior stairwell
wooden desk visible in the background against the far wall
tall indoor plant in the corner of the room
upholstered bench seating against the right wall
red and white circular sign on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit lobby or waiting area with vintage decor. The character in a green jacket walks toward a glass doorway that leads deeper into the building. A reception desk is visible in the background, and a green bench sits against the right wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior stairwell with wooden railings and framed artwork

events.description: character begins ascending the carpeted staircase
character passes under a ceiling light fixture illuminating the stairwell

agents.ego_description: climbing the carpeted staircase with white wooden railings, moving from ground floor to upper level

entered.detail: carpeted stairs with white painted wooden railings and balusters
white wooden handrail following the staircase ascent
small framed artworks mounted on the stairwell wall
flush-mounted ceiling fixture providing dim illumination

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow stairwell and begins ascending the carpeted stairs. White wooden railings line the right side, and framed pictures hang on the walls. The lighting is dim and atmospheric, coming from overhead fixtures.

scene_state.functional_zone: upstairs hallway with lounge room entrance

events.description: exits stairwell onto upper floor landing with double doors visible
corridor becomes darker as character moves away from stairwell lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper floor hallway, passing the Lounge Room double doors and continuing into a darker corridor section

entered.detail: wooden double doors with glass panels and LOUNGE ROOM sign above
narrow wooden table against the wall near the lounge doors
wall-mounted light fixture providing ambient lighting
framed artwork depicting a rural scene with house and trees

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the character enters an upper floor hallway. Double doors labeled LOUNGE ROOM appear on the right, along with a wooden console table. The character continues past into a progressively darker corridor where a framed landscape painting becomes visible on the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit corridor with vintage painting and elevator access

events.description: character stops to examine the landscape painting with flashlight
character resumes walking toward the elevator at corridor end

agents.ego_description: pausing to shine a flashlight on a landscape painting, examining it closely before continuing down the dark corridor toward an elevator

entered.detail: metal elevator doors with vertical ribbed pattern at corridor end
wall-mounted elevator call panel with buttons

segments.scene_description: In the darkest section of the corridor, the character stops to illuminate and examine a framed landscape painting with a flashlight. After a moment, the character continues walking toward a metal elevator door at the end of the hallway, passing the painting which now appears on the left side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit vintage lobby through a narrow stairwell and into a progressively darkening upper-floor corridor. It begins with the character in a green jacket walking past a reception desk and a green bench toward a glass doorway. As the character passes through the door, the scene shifts to a narrow stairwell where they ascend carpeted stairs lined with white wooden railings and framed pictures under dim overhead lighting. Upon reaching the top, the camera follows the character into a hallway past a wooden console table and lounge room doors, moving deeper into a corridor where the light fades. The sequence finally concludes as the character pauses to illuminate a landscape painting with a flashlight before continuing toward a metal elevator door at the end of the dark hall.
